data.body: e4df keystone review: r1 INDETERMINATE (Option A hedge 'confirm before build' — owner had approved; locked A as decided). r2 BLOCK x2 (same point): my 'tolerant-reader old-clients-ignore' framing was WRONG — op-cert events OMIT the HMAC signature field, so old clones read them as UNSIGNED (can't verify), not 'ignore an added field'. Corrected framing: op-cert events preserved-but-unverifiable on pre-upgrade clones (like SSHSIG authorship / TAG_DELTA); upgrade verify hosts first. Record-schema extension IS additive (HMAC records unchanged). r3 running bgmjcfgyq. Keystone RED tests pre-drafted+parsed (happy: producer stores envelope, read-helper roundtrip+verify; held-out: compaction survival, HMAC->None, additive-invariance, fold-through).
